name: strain_detail
description: Get full metadata for one strain: breeder, type, description, lineage/parents, cannabinoids, terpenes and genetic neighbors. Does NOT include forum posts or images by default — use strain_forum_posts and strain_images for those.

strain_name.description: Canonical strain name, as returned by strain_search.

include_observations.description: Inline the forum observations too. Default false — they are large.

name: strain_forum_posts
description: Get community forum posts and grow-journal excerpts about a strain, collected from Overgrow, Rollitup, THCFarmer, ICMag and Reddit. Each post has its source, author, URL and text. Use this for real grower experience: yield, difficulty, flowering time, taste.

strain_name.description: Canonical strain name, as returned by strain_search.

source.description: Optional filter by forum: overgrow, rollitup, thcfarmer, icmag or reddit.

name: strain_images
description: Get URLs of photographs of a strain — bud shots and grow photos harvested from forum posts and filtered by a vision model down to actual plant imagery. Returns the image URL plus the post it came from.

strain_name.description: Canonical strain name, as returned by strain_search.

name: strain_import
description: Start a background import of a strain that is not yet in the database. Scrapes SeedFinder for lineage, Kannapedia and Leafly for chemistry, and four forums plus Reddit for posts and photos. Returns immediately with a job_id — the import takes SEVERAL MINUTES. Poll strain_import_status with that job_id until status is 'done', then read the data with the other strain_* tools. Only call this after strain_search has come back empty.

strain_name.description: Name of the strain to import, e.g. 'Blue Dream'.

force.description: Re-scrape and replace existing forum observations. Default false.

name: strain_import_status
description: Check an import started by strain_import. Returns status (queued, running, done or failed), percent complete, a human-readable message, how many posts and images have been saved, and — once done — the imported strain's detail.

name: strain_neighbors
description: Get the k nearest strains to a given strain by genetic and chemical distance, with their distances. Use this to answer 'what is similar to X?'.

strain_name.description: Canonical strain name, as returned by strain_search.

name: strain_search
description: Search the cannabis strain database by name. Returns matching strains with breeder, type, whether a genomic/chemical sample exists, and dominant terpenes. Use this FIRST to resolve a user's fuzzy strain name into a canonical name before calling any other strain_* tool. If it returns no results, the strain is not in the database yet — use strain_import to fetch it.

query.description: Strain name or partial name, e.g. 'blue dream'.

complete_only.description: Only strains that have a complete genomic/chemical sample. Default false.

name: strain_terpene_profile
description: Get the terpene profile for a strain: each terpene with its value, plus the dominant terpene. Terpenes drive a strain's aroma and effect (myrcene = sedating/earthy, limonene = citrus/uplifting, caryophyllene = peppery). Returns an error if no chemical assay exists for the strain.

strain_name.description: Canonical strain name, as returned by strain_search.
